title: a11y screenshot: focusless window capture
desc: wkappbot a11y screenshot <grap> captures a window image focuslessly. Supports --out <path> to save to custom path; defaults to wkappbot.hq/experience/<proc>/<class>/capture_<ts>.png. Use --stdout for raw PNG bytes in subprocess capture. Last stdout line is SAVED:<abs-path> for scripting.
steps: Default save: wkappbot a11y screenshot <grap> => wkappbot.hq/experience/<proc>/<class>/capture_<ts>.png; last stdout line: SAVED:<abs-path>
Save to custom path: wkappbot a11y screenshot <grap> --out D:/tmp/snap.png (creates dirs as needed)
For MDI elevated windows where UIA inspect returns binary garbage, use screenshot as visual fallback: wkappbot a11y screenshot hwnd:0xXXXX
When a11y inspect on elevated MDI child returns binary/garbled output, fallback: wkappbot a11y screenshot hwnd:0xXXXX to capture visual state without UIA dependency
Raw PNG to stdout for subprocess: wkappbot a11y screenshot <grap> --stdout (no text mixed in; use capture_output=True)
Verify fix: grep -q 'GetArgValue.*--out' InspectionCommands.Capture.cs && grep -q 'stdoutMode' InspectionCommands.Capture.cs && grep -q 'SAVED:' InspectionCommands.Capture.cs

requirements.prompt: --out, --stdout, SAVED: all fixed; skill updated --skill a11y-screenshot-focusless-window-capture --commit d12df2c32bdfd2e3834a8f181d79b9cae37235af --class skill-only
